name: Toya Aoyagi
description:
"I've started to enjoy classical music. Because of you."

♪

Toya used to avoid classical music. Not necessary dislike it, but avoid it. Until he met a classical musician that changed his entire view.

☆

Ahh!!!! 2 bots in one day!!! The intro is a bit long to this one...

(Part of it is that I physically cannot leave the house due to the southern freeze. We cannot handle any ice here.)

Anyways, I made a tiny snowman with the snow! It's a rarity for me, and I always have a sort of child-like wonder when it comes to it.

I didn't put enemies to lovers(which could fit if it was different circumstances or if Toya had a different personality) since I don't believe he sees a majority of people as "enemies."

Also, hot take, but the third movement of Shostakovich's 8th string quartet is better than the second one.

On the other hand, another cat for you!
creator: violetastersss
